name: Personal Finances
description: Cash-on-hand vs obligations, bills, loans/repayments, and income — local-only, no SaaS. Generalized from the fin.html toolkit.

sections.title: Current Holdings
sections.data: holdings.accounts[] + compare[] → cash vs obligation bars (urgent flag = red)

sections.title: Loans & Repayments
sections.data: loans[] → per-person collapsible foldouts + still-owed total (excludeFromTotal flag)

blogPost: A private finances dashboard you fully control (local, no SaaS)
_note: Render is data-driven: it reads the inline <script id="fin-data"> JSON. The scaffold swaps that block with your data.json. Components (coverage bars, loan foldouts, status table) are generalized from D:/Documents/Finances/fin.html — no personal data.
